#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Merge LoRA adapter into base model and save."""
import os
import sys
import torch
from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration
from peft import PeftModel

base_model_path = '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct'
lora_path = 'checkpoints/lora/final'
output_path = 'checkpoints/merged'

print(f"Loading base model from {base_model_path}...")
model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(
    base_model_path,
    torch_dtype=torch.float16,
    device_map='cpu',
    local_files_only=True,
)
print("Base model loaded")

print(f"Loading LoRA adapter from {lora_path}...")
model = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, lora_path)
print("LoRA loaded")

print("Merging LoRA into base model...")
model = model.merge_and_unload()
print("Merged")

print(f"Saving merged model to {output_path}...")
os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)
model.save_pretrained(output_path)
print("Model saved")

print("Saving processor...")
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(
    lora_path,
    local_files_only=True,
)
processor.save_pretrained(output_path)
print("Processor saved")

print(f"Done! Merged model saved to {output_path}")
print(f"Contents: {os.listdir(output_path)}")
